description: Discussion on the Solana community validator call covering updates on nonce features, delegation program issues, and hardware survey requests. Dan from Holoplex presents on the Geyser plugin implementation.
topic_summary: Validator community updates including nonce feature status [t=39:72], delegation program fixes [t=121:79], and a hardware survey [t=217:01]. Dan from Holoplex discusses the Geyser plugin [t=269:45].
